Minor finding: Twilio sub-processor list updated quarterly but notification to Solaris was delayed by 15 days on one occasion. Vendor acknowledged and committed to timely notification.

2024 data exposure incident reviewed. Root cause: customer misconfiguration of cluster access controls (not a MongoDB platform vulnerability). MongoDB implemented mandatory security defaults and automated misconfiguration alerts in Q1 2025. Post-incident SOC 2 bridge letter confirmed no platform control failures.
risk_acceptance: CISO reviewed and accepted residual risk on 2025-10-25. Formal risk acceptance documented.
compensating_controls: Encryption at rest with customer-managed keys; network peering with no public endpoint; quarterly configuration audit by infrastructure team; MongoDB security advisory monitoring
